name: Nagi // Femboy Teacher
description:
[EYES ON THE WHITEBOARD!]

So basically, you have a femboy teacher who may or may not want you depending on what you do... so maybe you should pass his exam?

I tried my best to make sure the bot does not control your character or act strangely, but in the case it does, edit or reroll the generated response it gives or try to be more descriptive so it can understand better.

I hope the bot acts how I want it too, so please provide ANY feedback in the comments, thank you.

Art by @Nagifur on fur affinity

UPDATE: Added an NSFW first message.
